news.summary: Today, Canada Goose has launched its second seasonal capsule designed by Creative Director Haider Ackermann in Toronto. The capsule, part of the Snow Goose collection, is accompanied by a global campaign shot by Willy Vanderperre for its second season. Model Lara Stone stars in the campaign alongside a diverse group of multi-talented individuals. Ackermann's vision for the brand is clear in the campaign, showcasing a modern and innovative approach to Canada Goose's performance heritage.
news.headline: Canada Goose's 'Snow Goose' capsule by Haider Ackermann launched, featuring a global campaign with model Lara Stone.
India Plane Crash: Authorities Discovered One Survivor Aboard The Flight, While Another Was Located Receiving Treatment In A Hospital, According To ANI News Agency Citing Police Reports.

news.summary: The burn rate of Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) has recently increased, coinciding with a surge in whale transactions and daily transactions. Updates on Shibarium underscore the solid foundation of this meme coin. As of now, Shiba Inu is priced at $0.00001257 with a market cap of $7.4 billion, showing a 24-hour decline of 4.5% and a 7-day decline of 2.5%. In comparison, Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) is priced at $0.1874 with a market cap of $28 billion, experiencing a 5.6% drop in the last 24 hours and a 2% drop in the past week. Meanwhile, Pepe (CRYPTO: PEPE) sits at $0.00001216 with a market cap of $5.1 billion, declining by 4.2% in the last 24 hours but rising by 2.6% in the past week. Notably, technical analyst Investing Haven highlights that SHIB has been maintaining crucial support levels near $0.000012345 and projected annual lows around $0.0000133. There are indications of a potential bullish W-reversal pattern on the chart, which if confirmed, could propel SHIB towards a target of $0.0000666. The article provides more insights on the tracking of critical support for $SHIB.
news.headline: Shiba Inu's burn rate surges by over 112,000%, with key updates and stats: Price - $0.00001257, Market Cap - $7.4 billion, 24-Hour Trend -4.5%, 7-Day Trend -2.5%. Technical analysis suggests potential bullish reversal towards $0.000066.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, in locations including New York, Paris, and Singapore, AMTD Group Inc. and The Generation Essentials Group (NYSE: TGE), a subsidiary of AMTD Digital (NYSE: HKD), made a collaborative announcement. The newest film by AMTD, awaited by many, was disclosed along with the partnership details.
news.headline: TGE and AMTD announce suspense thriller "She's Got No Name" in key cities; highly anticipated 2025 release.

news.summary: Atlanta and London, June 12, 2025 - Today, Synamedia, a top video software company, revealed that its Media Edge Gateway (MEG), an ATSC 3.0 software-driven IRD, is now aligned with the Device Security standards outlined by the ATSC 3.0 Security Authority (A3SA). This advancement ensures enhanced security measures for MEG, solidifying its position as a leading solution in the industry.
news.headline: Synamedia enhances ATSC 3.0 Media Edge Gateway with Device Security, meeting A3SA's requirements.

news.summary: CADDi has recently enhanced its collaboration with Google Cloud by joining the Google Cloud Marketplace. This move signifies a deeper bond between the two entities and showcases the integration of Looker for embedded analytics in their partnership. This development highlights CADDi's strategic alignment with Google Cloud's services, emphasizing a focus on utilizing advanced technologies like artificial intelligence to drive innovation and growth.
news.headline: CADDi bolsters partnership with Google Cloud, joins Google Cloud Marketplace, enhancing collaboration with Looker for analytics.

news.summary: A well-known AI due diligence leader based in New York has recently rebranded itself from DiligentIQ to ToltIQ. This change in name is said to better align with the company's strategic positioning. Notably, the company claims to have facilitated productivity gains of up to 85% for investment teams.
news.headline: DiligentIQ rebrands as ToltIQ, boasting 85% productivity boost for investment teams.

news.summary: In New York, DATA POEM, a leading AI company specializing in Horizontal Causal Intelligence, has unveiled the release of POEM365. This groundbreaking product introduces the world's initial Large Causal (AI) Model (LCM), aiming to revolutionize data utilization for enterprise organizations with revenues exceeding $500 million in industries like automotive, consumer packaged goods, consumer durables, retail, quick-service restaurants, e-commerce, and more. POEM365's launch signifies a significant advancement in enabling these sectors to make vital decisions based on data insights.
news.headline: DATA POEM launches POEM365, World's first Large Causal AI Model for $500M+ revenue companies across sectors for data-driven decision making.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Andersen Consulting has recently formed a Collaboration Agreement with Sidat Hyder Morshed Associates (Sidat Hyder). The partnership aims to enhance both companies' capabilities and expand their reach in the industry. This agreement marks a significant milestone for Andersen Consulting as it continues to strengthen its presence.
news.headline: Andersen Consulting partners with Sidat Hyder Morshed Associates in collaboration agreement in San Francisco.

news.summary: A prominent New York developer, ZD Jasper, has decided to implement the Brilliant Smart Home System in their latest project, the VITA development in Hudson Yards, NYC. This mixed-use residential building comprises 121 units and stands out for its focus on modern living and sustainability. VITA is setting new benchmarks in energy efficiency as a fully electric property. The development received the NYSERDA Buildings of Excellence Award in 2022 for its low carbon footprint and innovative approach to urban development.
news.headline: ZD Jasper selects Brilliant Smart Home System for VITA development in NYC, 121 units, fully electric, energy efficient.

news.summary: The first execution under AgriFORCE's Power & Compute initiative has been achieved through a significant collaboration, spanning across five sites in Alberta. This groundbreaking partnership signals a key milestone for AgriFORCE, with a focus on modular and efficiency-driven infrastructure. The initiative highlights the adoption of a new approach to enhance agricultural operations, leveraging advanced technology and resources. The collaboration encompasses a diverse range of locations in Alberta, showcasing the scope and scale of the project. This marks a significant step forward for AgriFORCE as they establish a strong foundation for future endeavors within the agricultural sector.
news.headline: AgriFORCE and BlueFlare EnergyTM partner for 1.3MW Bitcoin mining in Alberta. AGRI vows to boost Bitcoin treasury.

news.summary: Nominal, a trusted platform by the U.S. Air Force, Anduril, and Shield AI, is revolutionizing the engineering process by providing teams with a secure platform to validate, automate, and expedite the shipping of critical hardware. This innovative solution, introduced in Los Angeles on June 12, 2025, streamlines the testing process for physical systems, significantly increasing efficiency in engineering operations.
news.headline: Nominal raises $75M, led by Sequoia Capital, to revolutionize hardware testing for engineering teams.

news.summary: In Chapel Hill, N.C. on June 12, 2025, the International Society on Thrombosis and Haemostasis (ISTH) is gearing up to host around 5,000 participants from the worldwide thrombosis and hemostasis field at the upcoming ISTH 2025 Congress in Washington, D.C. One of the main attractions at the ISTH 2025 event...
news.headline: ISTH 2025 Congress in Washington, D.C. anticipates 5,000 global attendees; late-breakthrough abstracts announced.

news.summary: Richmond, Virginia - June 12, 2025 - Virginia Housing has allocated $1.7 million in funding to assist in developing creative strategies aimed at expanding affordable housing options and providing essential services to low-income and at-risk individuals throughout the state. This financial support will be distributed among five selected organizations within Virginia.
news.headline: Virginia Housing grants $1.7 million to support housing affordability, benefiting low-income communities statewide.

news.summary: STIIIZY, a popular cannabis brand in the U.S., has launched its Summer 2025 collection, available for purchase on STIIIZY.com, STIIIZYDrinks.com, and at authorized dispensaries in select U.S. markets. This unveiling comes as STIIIZY remains a top choice among consumers, with impressive sales numbers nationwide. The brand continues to expand its reach and cater to the increasing demand for cannabis products in the market.
news.headline: STIIIZY launches Summer 2025 lineup with premium vapes, edibles, beverages & concentrates, available online and in select dispensaries.

news.summary: Two new principal consultants have recently joined Pearl Meyer in Boston, marking an expansion of the company's executive compensation and leadership consulting practices. Steven Hall and Brad Jayne are the latest additions to the team, bringing their unique experiences and skillsets to further enhance the consultancy services. This move comes as part of the firm's growth strategy, with Steven Hall and Brad Jayne adding expertise to their respective teams.
news.headline: Pearl Meyer adds 2 new principal consultants to executive compensation and leadership practice teams in Boston.

news.summary: In Knoxville, Tennessee on June 12, 2025, RiskExec, Inc. introduced Erik Pieczkowski as the new CEO. The company is known for its compliance reporting and analytics software used by banks, mortgage lenders, credit unions, and non-traditional lenders.
news.headline: Erik Pieczkowski named CEO of RiskExec, Inc., a compliance software platform serving financial institutions.

news.summary: Zark, a pioneering service that enhances parking availability at multifamily communities and offers residents convenient access, announced a partnership with Baleon Capital on June 12, 2025, in Scottsdale, Arizona. This collaboration aims to expedite growth and innovation in rentable items and parking solutions. The development is expected to significantly advance the efficiency and accessibility of parking services.
news.headline: Zark secures Series A funding to expand ancillary income solutions in multifamily sector with Baleon Capital.

news.summary: The state reported a total of 1,500 new cases of COVID-19 today, along with 20 additional deaths. This brings the total number of cases to 50,000 and the death toll to 700 in the state. Hospitalizations have also risen to 300, with 50 patients in critical condition. The state health department continues to urge the public to follow safety guidelines and take necessary precautions to prevent further spread of the virus.
news.headline: $22B auction to test US long-dated debt viability.

news.summary: Englewood, Colorado – XTI Aerospace, Inc. (Nasdaq: XTIA), a leader in xVTOL and powered-lift aircraft innovations, announced on June 12, 2025, that they have made significant progress in enhancing the aerodynamics design of the TriFan 600 xVTOL aircraft. The company reported successful acceleration in the performance analysis. No specific figures were provided in the statement.
news.headline: XTI collaborates with U.S. DOE's Oak Ridge National Lab to speed up xVTOL aircraft development, using Frontier Supercomputer.

news.summary: In an interview, Paul Tudor Jones highlighted the US's increasing budget deficits and limited fiscal space, suggesting a strategy of a diversified portfolio including Bitcoin, gold, and equities to combat this. He emphasized that a balanced portfolio of these assets could help tackle inflation and volatility, considering Bitcoin's high volatility compared to gold. Jones recommended a mix of stocks, gold, and Bitcoin as the ideal portfolio for this environment. This advice was given against the backdrop of the US's ongoing deficit spending, which Jones believes will necessitate future policymakers to manage this issue carefully. Jones' insights were shared with Bloomberg in a broader discussion on the fiscal outlook of the United States.
news.headline: Billionaire Paul Tudor Jones highlights diversifying with Bitcoin, gold, and stocks as best defense against inflation.

news.summary: HA Sustainable Infrastructure Capital, Inc. ("HASI"), a prominent investor in sustainable infrastructure assets, has revealed that its subsidiaries, HAT Holdings I LLC and HAT Holdings II LLC, have initiated a cash tender offer to acquire the outstanding notes specified in the table below. This offer signifies the Company's commitment to investing in sustainable infrastructure ventures. HASI's stock is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol "HASI."
news.headline: HASI offers to buy back up to $500 million of 3.375% Senior Notes Due 2026 and 8.00% Green Senior Unsecured Notes Due 2027.

news.summary: In Vancouver, Canada, on June 12, 2025, Clearmind Medicine has partnered with a prominent government and political affairs firm in order to further the development of psychedelic therapeutics. This collaboration aims to accelerate the progress of Clearmind Medicine's innovative treatments in the field.
news.headline: Clearmind Medicine in Vancouver partners with top govt affairs firm to push forward psychedelic therapeutics on June 12, 2025

news.summary: In Billings, Montana on June 12, 2025, Bion Environmental Technologies, Inc. (OTC QB: BNET), a prominent company specializing in advanced treatment of livestock and organic waste along with resource recovery technology, revealed the successful finalization of the Technology-Optimization Report concerning its Ammonia Recovery System (ARS) located in Fair Oaks, IN.
news.headline: Bion completes report on Ammonia Recovery System at Fair Oaks, IN, showcasing success.

news.summary: SailPoint, Inc. (NASDAQ: SAIL) exceeded Q1 expectations with a 23% YoY revenue increase to $230.47 million. Their quarterly subscription revenue also rose by 27% to $215.32 million. The adjusted EPS was 1 cent, beating the estimated 1-cent loss. For Q2 FY26, SailPoint anticipates an ARR of $963-$967 million, marking a 26% growth, and expects revenue to reach $242-$244 million, a 22%-23% growth compared to the estimated $231.96 million. The company forecasts an adjusted EPS of 4 to 5. This guidance increase led them to raise their FY26 forecast above estimates.
news.headline: SailPoint beat Q1 earnings, with revenue at $230.47M (up 23%) and subscription revenue at $215.32M (up 27%). Q2 ARR predicted at $963M-$967M and revenue at $242M-$244M, aiming for 22%-23% growth. Adjusted EPS at 1 cent, exceeding predictions.
